Off Calendar May-30-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF'S AMENDED MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION

Appearances: Ashley DeGuzman of the Ashley Law Group (916.501.0693) for plaintiff and moving party; Tyler R. Austin of Hayes Scott Bonino Ellingson & Guslani LLP (650.637.9100)

Argued and the court modifies its order as follows: Plaintiff Martin Pena's motion for reconsideration is treated as an invitation for the Court to exercise its inherent authority to reconsider pre-judgment rulings, the Court accepts that invitation, and upon reconsideration based on the evidence submitted by Mr. Pena on this motion the March 18, 2025 order granting defendant State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's motion for summary judgment is vacated. Defendant may file a new summary motion. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/HEK)

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1- PLAINTIFF MARTIN PENA's Motion For Continuance For Summary Judgment.

Plaintiff's motion to continue the motion for summary judgment is denied for the reasons stated in the ruling granting State Farm's motion for summary judgment.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Mar-18-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Martin Pena, Esq. 650-784-5546 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Tyler Austin, Esq. 650-486-2879 Hayes Scott Bonino Ellingson Guslani LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Angela Pourtabib, CSR #13714, 415-601-7054, apourtabib@gmail.com.

ARGUED. Mr. Pena argues. The Court states it will hold off entering judgment if Mr. Pena can defeat either claim by filing a motion for reconsideration or a motion asking the court to reconsider on its own motion pursuant to the LeFrancois case. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT STATE FARM MUTUAL AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE COMPANY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

Defendant State Farm Mutual Automobile Insurance Company's motion for summary judgment is granted.

(see word minutes for full details)

Order is signed.
